summary: Possible accessibility barriers found in the Digital Accessibility Centre website

ai_suggested_observations.observation: Some images may lack alternative text, potentially causing issues for users who rely on screen readers or have visual impairments
ai_suggested_observations.why_it_may_matter: Users who rely on screen readers or have visual impairments may not be able to understand the content of images without alternative text
ai_suggested_observations.related_deterministic_evidence: Image with id 'foot-logo' has an empty alt attribute

ai_suggested_observations.observation: Some text may have low contrast with its background, potentially causing issues for users with visual impairments
ai_suggested_observations.why_it_may_matter: Users with visual impairments may have difficulty reading text with low contrast, potentially leading to frustration or abandonment of the website
ai_suggested_observations.related_deterministic_evidence: Computed foreground/background contrast is below the conservative 4.5:1 review threshold for some text elements

ai_suggested_observations.observation: Some content may not reflow properly when zoomed, potentially causing issues for users with visual impairments
ai_suggested_observations.why_it_may_matter: Users with visual impairments may need to zoom in on content to read it, and if the content does not reflow properly, it may become difficult to navigate or read
ai_suggested_observations.related_deterministic_evidence: A rendered element is wider than the narrow viewport or uses a large fixed pixel width

outreach_notes: The Digital Accessibility Centre website may have some accessibility barriers that could impact users with disabilities. We suggest reviewing the website for potential issues with image alternative text, text contrast, and content reflow.
limitations: AI Scout findings are suggestions and need human review.
AI Scout output is not a confirmed accessibility finding.
AI Scout does not determine legal compliance, WCAG compliance, or screen-reader behavior.
AI Scout output is not a needs human review accessibility finding.
